Package jline.util

Class Equations

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.util.Equations
  • public class Equations
extends Object
    Simple helper math functions.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Equations()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double[] cumSum​(double[] ar)
      Cumulative sum of an array, where the value at each index of the result is the sum of all the previous values of the input.
      static int[] cumSum​(int[] ar)
      Cumulative sum of an array, where the value at each index of the result is the sum of all the previous values of the input.
      static void elementAdd​(int[] ar, int i)
      Helper method that adds an integer to every element of an integer array.
      static double[] logspace​(int start, int stop, int n)  
      static int[] logspacei​(int start, int stop, int n)
      Generates an integer list of n logarithmically spaced values.
      protected static int nextPowerOfTwo​(int x)
      Given an integer x input, find the next integer y > x such that y is a power of 2.
      static double[][] transpose​(double[][] data)
      Transposes a 2D array of values.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • Equations

        public Equations()

    • Method Detail

      • cumSum

        public static int[] cumSum​(int[] ar)
        Cumulative sum of an array, where the value at each index of the result is the sum of all the previous values of the input.
        Parameters:
        ar - Array we want the cumulative sum of.
        Returns:
        New array that is the cumulative sum of the input.

      • cumSum

        public static double[] cumSum​(double[] ar)
        Cumulative sum of an array, where the value at each index of the result is the sum of all the previous values of the input.
        Parameters:
        ar - Array we want the cumulative sum of.
        Returns:
        New array that is the cumulative sum of the input.

      • logspace

        public static double[] logspace​(int start,
                                int stop,
                                int n)

      • logspacei

        public static int[] logspacei​(int start,
                              int stop,
                              int n)
        Generates an integer list of n logarithmically spaced values.
        Parameters:
        start - First element of array.
        stop - Last element of array.
        n - Number of values.
        Returns:
        Array of logarithmically spaced values.

      • transpose

        public static double[][] transpose​(double[][] data)
        Transposes a 2D array of values.
        Parameters:
        data - 2D array to be transposed.
        Returns:
        New 2D array of transposed data.

      • elementAdd

        public static void elementAdd​(int[] ar,
                              int i)
        Helper method that adds an integer to every element of an integer array.
        Parameters:
        ar - Array to be added to.
        i - Integer to add.

      • nextPowerOfTwo

        protected static int nextPowerOfTwo​(int x)
        Given an integer x input, find the next integer y > x such that y is a power of 2.
        Parameters:
        x - Input to find next power
        Returns:
        Closest integer greater than input that is a power of two.
